---
title: "References"
---

:::: {.references-grid}
[Laura Schechter](https://econ.wisc.edu/staff/schechter-laura/) (PhD Advisor) — [lschechter@wisc.edu](mailto:lschechter@wisc.edu)

[Jeffrey Smith](https://econ.wisc.edu/staff/smith-jeffrey/) — [econjeff@ssc.wisc.edu](mailto:econjeff@ssc.wisc.edu)

[Priya Mukherjee](https://aae.wisc.edu/faculty/pmukherjee7/) — [priya.mukherjee@wisc.edu](mailto:priya.mukherjee@wisc.edu)

[Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach](https://www.dianeschanzenbach.com/) — [diane.schanzenbach@georgetown.edu](mailto:diane.schanzenbach@georgetown.edu)
::::
